name: Laid to Rest

abilities.name: Grudge Against Death
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model is killed, it may drain a (t) to heal 1.

abilities.name: Final Repose
abilities.text: When this model declares an action, it may remove a Remains marker within 8" to add any one suit to its duel total.

actions.name: Restore Natural Order
actions.effects: Target a Remains marker. Place this model into base contact with the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: Card shows Lady Justice in combat pose with red/orange background
Grudge Against Death is once per activation ability
Restore Natural Order targets Remains markers and allows repositioning
Sudden Strike trigger uses (melee) symbol to indicate melee attack action
